channel.title: Web-Server on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Server on Pi Stack

item.title: OpenResty vs Nginx vs Caddy: Best Self-Hosted Web Server for Dynamic Apps 2026
item.description: When you need a web server that does more than serve static files — when you need dynamic routing, API handling, authentication logic, or real-time content generation — the choice of web server becomes critical. Three options dominate this space in 2026: OpenResty, Nginx, and Caddy. Each takes a fundamentally different approach to serving dynamic content, and picking the right one can save you from writing an entire backend service.
